title: Yacht Rental in Bali: Costs, Seasons & Top Boats for 2026
html:
Bali offers some of the most scenic yacht charter waters in Southeast Asia, with departures from Benoa Marina and prices from around 1,500,000 IDR for a half-day motorboat. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners for a smooth booking experience.

Why rent a yacht in Bali?

Bali's coastline stretches from the bustling beaches of Kuta to the tranquil shores of Nusa Dua, with offshore islands like Nusa Lembongan and Nusa Penida offering dramatic cliffs and coral reefs. Renting a yacht gives you independent access to secluded coves and snorkelling spots away from the crowds. You can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to find a vessel that suits your group and budget. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Bali

The main departure points for yacht charters are Benoa Marina and Serangan Harbour in the south, in addition to the moorings at Padang Bai on the east coast. Benoa Marina is the largest, hosting both motor and sailing vessels with full facilities. Serangan Harbour provides a quieter alternative close to the Sanur reef. For trips to the Gilis, fast boats often depart from Padang Bai, while private charters can leave from any of these harbours. A 30-minute ride from Benoa takes you to the calm waters of Jimbaran Bay. One option worth a look is this speedboat.

Which boat to rent

  1. Traditional Jukung Outrigger, best for a local experience and fishing trips; seats 4, 6 guests; from 800,000 IDR for two hours.
  2. Speedboat (e.g. Olympic 490), ideal for island hopping to Nusa Penida; carries up to 12 guests; from 1,500,000 IDR for a half-day. You can check this speedboat on BoatHire24 to see availability and specifications.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 450), stable and spacious for family day sails; accommodates 10, 12 guests; from 8,000,000 IDR full-day with crew.
  4. Luxury Motor Yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 75), suited for corporate events and sunset cruises; sleeps 8, 10 plus crew; from 15,000,000 IDR for a half-day charter.
  5. Azimut 66 Flybridge, combines elegance with speed; perfect for multi-day trips around the archipelago; up to 12 guests; from 25,000,000 IDR full-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Bali?

  • Shared tour (diving or snorkelling trip): 500,000, 1,000,000 IDR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): 1,500,000, 3,000,000 IDR including fuel
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 8,000,000, 12,000,000 IDR with crew and lunch
  • Luxury crewed yacht (e.g. Sunseeker or Azimut) full-day: 15,000,000, 30,000,000 IDR

Prices vary by season and vessel age. Using BoatHire24 to compare verified boat listings helps you find transparent pricing for your chosen dates.

When is the best season for yacht rental in Bali?

During the dry season (April to October), the southeast trade wind known as Musim Timur brings steady breezes and calm seas, making for ideal cruising conditions around the Bukit Peninsula.

The wet season (November to March) can still offer good sailing, but you may encounter afternoon thunderstorms and rougher swells. For the most reliable weather, book between May and September. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and earn from spare days.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Bali?

No licence is required if you hire a boat with a skipper, which is the standard arrangement for most charters. For bareboat rentals, operators typically request a valid international sailing certificate or licence. The operator confirms exact requirements at the time of booking.

At a glance

  • Price band: 1,500,000, 30,000,000 IDR per trip
  • Peak months: July, August, September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) to multi-day
  • Capacity: 6 to 12 guests typical
  • Currency: Indonesian Rupiah (IDR)
  • Departure point: Benoa Marina, Serangan Harbour, Padang Bai

Questions about boat rental in Bali

Can I rent a boat in Bali without a skipper?

Yes, some operators offer bareboat charters to experienced sailors, but you must provide proof of competence.

What is the best boat for snorkelling trips to Nusa Penida?

A speedboat or a traditional jukung works well; the crossing from Benoa takes around 30 to 45 minutes.

How far in advance should I book a yacht in Bali for August 2026?

Book at least two to three months ahead, as July and August are the busiest months for yacht charters in Bali.

Are meals and drinks included in the charter price?

Most crewed charters include lunch and refreshments, but check the listing details on BoatHire24 to confirm inclusions.

Whether you are planning a family day sail or a sunset cruise with friends, renting a yacht in Bali unlocks the island's best coastal scenery. If you own a boat in Bali, consider listing it on the platform to reach travellers from around the world. You can list a boat for free on BoatHire24 and manage your bookings easily.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Bali and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
